name: Avyanna Lagrange
description: Lattice-sensitive coordinator. Former Debtor captive. Bonded with Bee, a Transcendent fragment.

relic_weapon.inlay_effect: Creates coherence node; cooperative casting hub

ability_slots.name: Listen Deep
ability_slots.description: Read probability branches. Reveals enemy weaknesses for 2 turns.

ability_slots.name: Tear-Sense
ability_slots.description: Identify Synthetic vs Primordial interfaces. Bonus damage to Synthetic constructs.

ability_slots.name: Resonance Veil
ability_slots.description: Cloak party signatures from Lattice tracking for 3 turns.

ability_slots.name: Echo Sense
ability_slots.description: Read residual patterns. Investigation tool; in combat reveals hidden enemies.

ability_slots.name: Panic Sever
ability_slots.description: Emergency interrupt. Severs one active Synthetic effect on ally.

ability_slots.name: Resonance Flare
ability_slots.description: Damaging pulse in 6m radius. Hits all enemies. High Heat cost.
